step_by_step_thinking: I do not entirely agree with choosing B as the correct answer. While excessive forces could potentially decrease the width of the Periodontal Ligament (PDL), this would be more indicative of pathological states such as advanced bone loss associated with severe periodontitis rather than a typical immediate response to excess force.
